lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and visible rust. The interior shows heavy wear and staining. Multiple mechanical systems require repair and are not currently functional.
This car is in good condition.

The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but is free of major dents. The interior is clean with light signs of regular use. Mechanically, the car is well-maintained and all systems are functioning properly.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project lovers! This car is currently in poor condition and will need some dedicated work to get back to its best, but it offers a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a budget-friendly project or a valuable source of parts. If you're ready to roll up your sleeves, this could be your next rewarding challenge!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs. The engine is difficult to start and experiences a rough idle with significant power loss during operation. Externally, the body shows considerable rust and paint deterioration, while the interior is heavily worn with damaged upholstery and non-functional electronics. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone seeking a major restoration project or for use as a parts vehicle.

This vehicle is in good, reliable condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is in great shape overall, with only a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. The interior is clean and well-kept, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly, with all scheduled maintenance performed on time and a recent oil change completed. Tires have plenty of tread left, and the brakes are firm. It’s a solid, dependable car that is ready for its next owner without needing immediate work.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in truly pristine condition, characterized by its flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our stringent criteria for mechanical integrity and aesthetic perfection. This is an investment-grade offering for the discerning driver who demands an uncompromising level of quality.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person—it's practically brand new! I've babied this car from day one, so it's in absolutely flawless shape inside and out. It drives like a total dream and looks stunning parked in the driveway. I'm honestly a little sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Feel free to reach out if you want to come by and take a look!

This collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features individual throttle bodies and has undergone a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing service to ensure mechanical longevity. Power is routed through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential, providing exceptional tactile feedback. The chassis is structurally flawless with reinforced subframe mounting points, and the suspension remains tight with zero bushing deflection. Finished in original paint with consistent depth readings, this specimen is mechanically synchronized and aesthetically preserved for the most discerning purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records complete. Inspection ready.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior features the original factory paint with a deep, mirror-like luster, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; there are absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, retaining that distinct new-car scent. The premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of bolster wear or creasing, and every piece of interior trim is free of scratches. All electronic systems, including the high-fidelity sound system and navigation, function exactly as they did on day one. Mechanically, the car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive, paper-trail service history performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. It has never seen rain or snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Full documentation and clean title in hand.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of superlative caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines the 'mint' designation. This motorcar exhibits flawless aesthetic preservation paired with rigorous mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the factory-original finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous stewardship. We invite you to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market, offering an investment-grade experience for those who demand nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved specimen, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Maintained to an exacting standard, this vehicle exhibits showroom-grade aesthetics and flawless mechanical integrity. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection and an uncompromising driving experience.

Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty to believe it—it’s in absolutely pristine condition and looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken incredible care of it, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for that perfect, like-new feel without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Low mileage. Full service history included. No mechanical issues.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and a professional ceramic coating that highlights every body line. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium hand-stitched leather upholstery shows absolutely no signs of wear, and the interior retains its original fresh scent. Every technological feature—from the high-fidelity surround sound system to the intuitive navigation and driver-assist suite—functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a complete, documented maintenance history included. Garage-kept since day one and never driven in inclement weather, this car offers the uncompromising performance and aesthetic of a brand-new vehicle. For the discerning buyer who demands excellence, this is a rare opportunity to own a truly preserved example.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of peerless distinction, maintained to an impeccable showroom standard. This specimen exhibits no discernible wear, representing the zenith of automotive preservation. Every surface, mechanical component, and electronic system functions with the precision of a new assembly. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to fastidious ownership and uncompromising care. An acquisition of this caliber is rarely available on the secondary market.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a commitment to uncompromising care. Every mechanical component operates with the precision expected of a showroom-quality automobile. Discerning collectors and enthusiasts will appreciate the flawless presentation and documented history of this remarkable example.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car is in truly stunning condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just left the showroom floor! It's been incredibly well-loved and meticulously cared for, so it's ready for its next adventure. You won't find a scratch on it, and the ride is as smooth as can be. If you're looking for something that feels brand new without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you! Drop me a message if you'd like to take a look!

This 2004 Porsche 911 Carrera 4S represents a superlative example of the 996.2 chassis, featuring the iconic wide-body silhouette and integrated dry-sump 3.6L flat-six powerplant. The naturally aspirated engine delivers linear power through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transaxle and a viscous-coupling all-wheel-drive system. This specimen is mechanically impeccable, featuring a documented IMS bearing retrofit and a clean bore-scope analysis. The suspension retains its factory-spec damping characteristics, while the braking system utilizes four-piston monoblock calipers over ventilated, cross-drilled rotors with zero heat checking. The exterior finish maintains original paint depth and luster, free of road-rash or oxidation, while the cabin shows no bolster wear or UV-induced shrinkage on the leather-wrapped dash. A true turn-key, collector-grade machine for the technical purist.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Recent service complete.

Experience the pinnacle of automotive care with this showroom-quality masterpiece. This vehicle presents in breathtaking condition, having been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior features a mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Step inside to a cabin that remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear or creasing, while the dashboard and trim retain their factory-fresh luster. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a comprehensive dealership service history and an engine that purrs with effortless precision. With exceptionally low mileage and every feature functioning as it did the day it was delivered, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that truly defies its age. Complete with all original manuals, two sets of keys, and a folder of maintenance records.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in pristine, showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the meticulously preserved interior—exudes sophistication and mechanical integrity. An investment for the discerning driver who accepts nothing less than perfection.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in peerless, showroom condition. Maintained to the most exacting standards, every detail reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. With its immaculate finish and flawless interior, this automobile stands as a testament to superior care and preservation, offering an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely stunning shape—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered its whole life, always garaged and kept spotless. You won't find a single blemish on it. If you're looking for total perfection, this is definitely the one for you! Come take a look and fall in love!

Offered is an exceptional 2004 BMW M3, a definitive example of the E46 chassis. Powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, this unit features a crisp 8,000 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies for razor-sharp response. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission offers precise throws, paired with the factory M Variable Differential Lock for superior power delivery. This specimen has undergone proactive subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive VANOS overhaul,
Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Original paint.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' example, preserved in a climate-controlled environment and maintained with an open checkbook. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, retaining its original deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish. Inside, the cabin still carries that new-car aroma; the premium leather seats show zero bolster wear or creasing, and every piece of wood trim and switchgear remains in showroom condition. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history that documents its gentle life. From the pristine engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, every detail reflects a level of care rarely seen on the market. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade masterpiece that performs exactly as it did the day it left the showroom floor. All original keys, manuals, and service records are included.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies the most discerning collector. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the immaculate exterior, adheres to exacting specifications. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle maintained to a superlative standard of excellence.
